title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
why: Salesforce's introduction of a new Slackbot AI agent is a significant development for those in automation and workplace AI, showing tangible advancements in tools that can be used today.
blurb: Salesforce has unveiled a new AI Slackbot, positioning itself against giants like Microsoft and Google in the AI workspace arena. This Slackbot is not just for chat but is a robust automation tool within Slack's ecosystem. Builders should look at integrating this with n8n for customized workflows.
move: If youre using Slack, start integrating the new AI Slackbot with n8n to create custom workflows. This will streamline your team's operations.
tweet: Salesforce drops a new AI Slackbot, challenging Microsoft and Google. If youre building on Slack, now's the time to integrate with n8n for custom workflows.

title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure

blurb: Railway just raised $100 million to challenge AWS with an AI-native cloud infrastructure. This isnt just another cloud service, its optimized for AI tasks. Builders should take note and start experimenting. Try using n8n to automate deployment workflows with Railway.

tweet: Railway secures $100M to take on AWS with AI-native cloud. For builders, this means a new playground for AI-first projects. Start integrating Railway with n8n to see what it can do.

title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
why: Anthropic's launch of Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files without coding, is a significant tool that builders and automation enthusiasts can start using today to enhance productivity.
blurb: Anthropic just launched Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works directly in your files with zero coding. Its like having a junior dev at your fingertips. Builders should consider integrating Cowork with their existing workflows using n8n. This move could automate routine tasks and free up your time.
move: This week, try linking Cowork with your workflows using n8n. Automate routine tasks or file management for significant time savings.
tweet: Anthropic just launched Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files without coding. For builders, its like adding a junior dev to your team. This week, connect it with n8n for smart automation.

title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
why: microsoft is putting $2.5 billion into a company that does nothing but deploy AI into businesses. theyre not just building tools anymore, theyre going all in on deployment services. thats a big signal about where the money actually is.
blurb: microsoft is making a big splash by launching a new company dedicated to AI deployment, backed by $2.5 billion. the signal: the money is moving from building models to deploying them inside real businesses. if the biggest software company on earth says deployment is the business, thats worth acting on.
move: if youre building anything for businesses, the deployment layer just got validated by $2.5B. look at what shipped in the deployment stack this quarter and figure out which piece of AI rollout you can own for your niche this week.
tweet: Microsoft's new $2.5B AI deployment company is a big move into services, not just tools. The model layer is a commodity. The deployment layer is the business.
